## Codex Worker Spawn Prompt — CFP-1412 fixture WITH [ORIGIN-MAIN-DIRECTIVE] block
# lint PASS expected (directive block present, ADR-081 Amendment 8 §결정 D9)

**Lane**: 구현 / phase: 구현

**sandbox boundary**: local Phase 2 worktrees only
network_scope: repo-fetch-only

[ORIGIN-MAIN-DIRECTIVE]
Run: git -C <worktree_path> fetch origin main
Verify: git -C <worktree_path> rev-parse origin/main
Use origin/main as baseline for all fact claims in this prompt.
[/ORIGIN-MAIN-DIRECTIVE]

## Task

Perform analysis of the following files within the worktree:
- scripts/check-codex-origin-main-directive-presence.sh
- scripts/lib/check_codex_origin_main_directive_presence.py

Return findings in the standard review-verdict-v4 format.
